name: google-ads-agent
description: Google Ads management for Gemini CLI — dual-lane sign-in (static API + zero-setup proxy OAuth via ahmeego.com), multi-identity with OS keychain, dual-backend MCP server with local API + remote ahmeego.com access. Live API tools, agent skills, commands, hooks, and custom theme.

settings.name: Google Ads Developer Token
settings.description: Your Google Ads API developer token from ads.google.com → Tools & Settings → API Center

settings.name: Google Ads Client ID
settings.description: OAuth2 client ID from Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

settings.name: Google Ads Client Secret
settings.description: OAuth2 client secret from Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

settings.name: Google Ads Refresh Token
settings.description: OAuth2 refresh token generated via OAuth playground or google-ads Python library

settings.name: Google Ads Login Customer ID
settings.description: Your MCC (Manager) account ID, format: 1234567890 (no dashes)

settings.name: Remote Site URL
settings.description: URL for ahmeego.com remote backend (e.g., https://ahmeego.com). Enables access to 700+ accounts via Cloudflare.

settings.name: Remote Site Session ID (optional, legacy)
settings.description: Optional legacy fallback. Since v2.4, run `/google-ads:login` to sign in with any Google account — the session is stored in your OS keychain automatically and this env var is not needed.
